iShares MSCI World UCITS ETF (Acc)

FUND FACTS AS AT 31 JANUARY 2026

Product Details
ISIN: IE00B4L5Y983
Bloomberg Ticker: IWDA LN
Stock Exchange: London Stock Exchange
Currency: USD

Fund Information
Legal Structure: UCITS ETF
Fund Domicile: Ireland
Inception Date: 25 September 2009
Fiscal Year End: 31 May
Share Class: Accumulating
Distribution Policy: Income is reinvested

Costs
Total Expense Ratio (TER): 0.20% p.a.
Ongoing Charges: 0.20%

Fund Size
Net Assets: USD 45.2 billion

Investment Objective
The Fund seeks to track the performance of the MSCI World Index, which is designed to
measure the performance of large and mid-cap stocks across 23 developed markets.

Top Holdings (as at 31 January 2026)
1. Apple Inc - 4.52%
2. Microsoft Corp - 3.98%
3. Amazon.com Inc - 2.14%
4. NVIDIA Corp - 1.87%
5. Alphabet Inc Class A - 1.65%

Benchmark Information
Benchmark: MSCI World Index
Replication Method: Physical (optimized sampling)
Number of Holdings: 1,512

Performance
Tracking Difference (1 Year): -0.05%
Tracking Difference (3 Year): -0.04%
Tracking Difference (5 Year): -0.03%

Risk Profile
SRRI: 6 (on a scale of 1-7)

Contact Information
Fund Manager: BlackRock Asset Management Ireland Limited
Administrator: State Street Fund Services (Ireland) Limited

This document is marketing material.
